articles.author: Rael Ombuor
articles.title: France reports first Ebola patient as cases in Africa surge above 1,000 - The Washington Post
articles.description: France said a doctor back from a humanitarian mission was infected and in stable condition, while experts said the outbreak in Africa could be the worst ever recorded.
articles.content: NAIROBI Reported Ebola cases have surged above 1,000 in the Democratic Republic of Congo, and health experts are warning this could be one of the worst outbreaks, rivaling the largest on record, whic… [+55 chars]

articles.author: Kristina Killgrove
articles.title: 'A weird result from an already weird hominin': Archaeologists discover all Homo naledi skeletons found in South African cave are female - Live Science
articles.description: A cutting-edge analysis of the teeth from Homo naledi skeletons in a South African cave system found no males within the group. Experts are unsure what to make of the finding.
